channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: SpaceX gains 6% in premarket after record debut. Here's what's driving the valuation debate
item.description: SpaceX is now valued at over $2 trillion after its stock rallied on the first day of trade.

item.title: Fox to buy streaming device maker Roku for $22 billion
item.description: Fox, the owner of the news and sports networks, said it has reached a deal to acquire Roku for about $22 billion in enterprise value.

item.title: U.S.-Iran deal explained: What we know — and what remains unresolved
item.description: Stocks rose after a preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement, but questions remain over Hormuz, Israel and what follows a potential signing in Geneva.

item.title: KFC leans into boneless chicken, new drinks as chain tries to regain market share
item.description: KFC is facing more competition from legacy giants and upstarts alike, thanks to the growing global popularity of chicken.

item.title: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Micron, Ferrari, Rocket Lab, DataDog & more
item.description: Here are Monday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: SpaceX, United Airlines, Roku & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

item.title: Trump says France must scrap tech 'sales tax' or face 100% wine tariffs: NY Post
item.description: President Donald Trump issued the threat ahead of this week's G7 summit in Évian-les-Bains, France.

item.title: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.

item.title: Oil shock 'far from over' as analysts warn of new Middle East risk premium
item.description: Commodity analysts warn that oil price volatility is likely to persist, despite the U.S.-Iran peace agreement.

item.title: Charlie Javice reportedly seeking a pardon from Trump
item.description: Javice founded a startup called Frank that JPMorgan acquired in 2021 for $175 million.

item.title: Ron Baron bought $1 billion of SpaceX shares in IPO, lifting stake to $25 billion
item.description: "I think we're gonna make hundreds of billions of dollars," Baron said Monday on CNBC's "Squawk Box."

item.title: Sen. Warren asks Trump if administration plans to raise Social Security retirement age
item.description: In a new letter to President Donald Trump, Senator Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., asks what the administration's plans are for Social Security reform.

item.title: Can Trump Accounts help close the wealth gap? Here's what experts say stands in the way
item.description: Trump Accounts come with free money for some children, but it may not be enough to reduce the wealth gap, some experts say.

item.title: JetBlue bets big on Fort Lauderdale, from a new airport lounge to an international gateway
item.description: JetBlue faces heavy competition from Miami International Airport, an American Airlines stronghold.

item.title: Treasury yields slide as Iran deal drives rethink on Fed interest rate hikes
item.description: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — fell over 4 basis points to 4.441%.

item.title: UK to ban social media for under-16s to 'give kids their childhood back'
item.description: The ban could include platforms like Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X.

item.title: U.S. crude drops below $80 for the first time since March as Iran deal is set to open Hormuz Strait
item.description: "The Deal with the Islamic Republic of Iran is now complete," Trump said in a Truth Social post.

item.title: Ferrari shares have struggled of late. Morgan Stanley says concerns are overblown
item.description: Ferrari shares should rise as the Italian firm proves that concerns over its recent product launches and growth targets are overblown, per Morgan Stanley.

item.title: Rivian CEO taking different approach than Elon Musk for humanoid robotics company
item.description: Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe started a robotics company late last year called Mind Robotics that he says has has raised more than $1 billion.

item.title: Here are the 3 big things we're watching in the stock market in the week ahead
item.description: The Kevin Warsh era is upon us.

item.title: Drugmakers race to find a place in the next wave of obesity drugs
item.description: Drugmakers are betting they can crack into the obesity drug market that Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly currently dominate.

item.title: Reverse mortgage scams: How to spot them, avoid them and lenders you can trust
item.description: Here are six types of reverse mortgage scams and how you can avoid them. Plus, three lenders you can trust.

item.title: Trump heads to G7 summit in France after reaching deal to end war with Iran
item.description: The G7 is likely to address the Iran peace deal, as well as Russia's war against Ukraine, which continues to rage in eastern Europe.

item.title: Elon Musk drifted from Larry Page over a decade ago, but their companies are closer than ever
item.description: SpaceX and Google have a long and complicated relationship, but they were both celebrating this week after Elon Musk's company held its blockbuster IPO.

item.title: World leaders welcome U.S.-Iran deal as Europe signals sanctions relief, urges Hormuz reopening
item.description: The agreement came after more than three months of stop-start negotiations and bouts of fighting since late February, roiling global energy and commodities markets.

item.title: Zhipu surges 33% as Wall Street raises bets on China AI after Anthropic curbs
item.description: Shares of Chinese AI model developer Zhipu surged as Wall Street banks raised bets on the company's ability to capture global AI demand.

item.title: New student loan plan comes with higher bills for many. Tax planning can help cut your payments
item.description: With some planning, federal student loan borrowers can save on their monthly bills under the U.S. Department of Education's new repayment plan.

item.title: SoftBank surges more than 10% as Iran-U.S. deal sends Asia tech stocks soaring
item.description: Asian tech stocks surged Monday on news that Iran and the U.S. have reached a deal.

item.title: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
item.description: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.

item.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about the growth prospects of these 3 stocks
item.description: Continued volatility presents an opportunity to find stocks trading at attractive prices and benefit from their long-term growth potential.
